name: Meersburger Kirschen-Dessert (Cherry Desert Meeresburg)
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Cream Cheese; Soften to Room Temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and drain cherries. Remove stones and reserve 8 whole cherries for garnish.
2. Place cherries in a bowl; add kirsch.
3. In a small pan, boil sugar and water until the mixture is hot. Add this to the cherries and stir to blend.
4. Cover and let soak for 20 minutes.
5. Cut ladyfingers in half and divide into 4 portions. Place each portion in individual glass dishes.
6. Arrange cherries on top of the ladyfingers.
7. Thoroughly blend cream cheese, sugar, vanilla extract, and ground almonds.
8. Whip the remaining cream and carefully fold it into the cream-cheese mixture.
9. Spoon over the cherries.
10. Garnish with chopped pistachio nuts and whole cherries.
